tool_args.label: Church Ave Truck Delivery Example
tool_args.raw_text: Church Avenue Truck Delivery Windows example: Before - Lane blocked 25% of time by double parking, slow and unpredictable travel times. After - Travel speeds 20% faster, and more reliable.

payload.claim_text: Before: Lane blocked 25% of time by double parking. Slow and unpredictable travel times. After: Travel speeds 20% faster, and more reliable.

tool_args.label: Key Points Raised at Outreach Events
tool_args.raw_text: Key Points raised at Outreach Events: Curb access should be preserved for shoppers/merchants; Double parking contributes to bus delays; SBS should stop at major subway/rail connections; Outreach to merchants/vendors is essential; DOT must evaluate how proposal affects traffic

payload.claim_text: Key Points raised at Outreach Events: Curb access should be preserved for shoppers/merchants; Double parking of cars and trucks contributes to bus delays; Select Bus Service should stop at major subway/rail connections; Outreach to merchants and vendors is essential; DOT must evaluate how the proposal affects traffic

tool_args.label: Double Parking Analysis - Amsterdam Av to Adam Clayton Powell Jr. Blvd

payload.claim_text: Percentage of time when vehicles were double parked from Amsterdam Av to Adam Clayton Powell Jr. Blvd: North Curb 77%, 9%, 17%, 16%, 25%; South Curb 26%, 31%, 10%, 10%, 31%
payload.location: Amsterdam Avenue to Adam Clayton Powell Jr. Boulevard

location_normalized.raw_text: Amsterdam Avenue to Adam Clayton Powell Jr. Boulevard

tool_args.label: Existing Level of Service on 125th Street
tool_args.raw_text: Less than 45s delay (mid LOS D) at all intersections

payload.claim_text: Less than 45s delay (mid LOS D) at all intersections along 125th Street

tool_args.label: Proposed Parking Regulation Changes in CB10
tool_args.raw_text: DOT proposes: retaining 1-Hour Metered Parking in CB10; adding 1-Hour Metered Commercial Loading 8 AM-12 PM at selected locations in CB10; extending metered parking between St. Nicholas Av and Lenox Av until 10 PM

payload.claim_text: DOT proposes retaining 1-Hour Metered Parking in CB10, adding 1-Hour Metered Commercial Loading from 8 AM to 12 PM at selected locations in CB10, and extending metered parking between St. Nicholas Av and Lenox Av until 10 PM to encourage parking availability during evening hours. Subject to Community Board approval.

tool_args.label: Implementation in 2013
tool_args.raw_text: Next Steps: Revise Design based on Community Input. Finalize Curb Regulations. Finalize Bus Stop Locations. Implementation in 2013.

payload.claim_text: Next Steps: Revise Design based on Community Input, Finalize Curb Regulations, Finalize Bus Stop Locations, Implementation in 2013
